objectives: Understand the process of boiling water
Learn the importance of water temperature and timing

steps.instruction: Fill a pot with water and place it on the stove.
Turn on the heat to high and wait for the water to start bubbling.
Once the water reaches a rolling boil, you can add ingredients like pasta or vegetables.

conclusion: By the end of this lesson, you will be able to boil water safely and effectively, a fundamental skill in cooking.
